candidates.why: Component revenue line, but a separate Total Revenue line exists which better represents top-line revenue.
Potential revenue component but appears unused (all nan) and less comprehensive than Total Revenue.
Major revenue component but does not capture all revenue streams compared with Total Revenue.
Generic revenue label but appears unused (all nan); Total Revenue is the appropriate aggregate.
Explicit aggregate of all revenue streams; best representation of total top-line revenue.
A liability representing revenue received but not yet earned; not suitable as current-period revenue.

candidates.row_label: Deferred gains on sales of vessels
candidates.why: Deferred gain, not operating revenue.

variables.notes: Total Revenue clearly aggregates the various charter and voyage revenues and is the standard top-line choice.
No suitable COGS or cost of sales line is available in the candidate list, so COGS is set to zero by default.

candidates.why: Represents gains, not SG&A overhead; should not be classified as SG&A.
Direct operating costs for vessels; economically closer to COGS than SG&A.
Classic SG&A-type overhead category; matches the definition of SG&A components.
Accrued liability related to ship operating expenses, not the expense itself for the period.
Accrued administrative expenses as a liability; not the income statement expense line.

variables.notes: Income Statement 'Administrative expenses' is the clearest SG&A overhead component; ship operating expenses are more like COGS and are excluded.
No R&D-related line appears in the candidate list; XRD is treated as zero.

candidates.row_label: Share of results from associated company and gain on equity interest
candidates.why: Equity method and gain line, not interest expense.
Primary income statement line for interest expense; best measure of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion specifically on finance leases; a component of total interest cost but narrower than overall interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Net income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Earnings attribution, not interest expense.
Comprehensive income attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling Interest
candidates.why: Duplicate comprehensive attribution; not interest.
Part of EPS disclosure; not interest expense.
Supplemental label with no recent values; redundant with main 'Interest expense' line.
Capitalized interest, not period expense flowing through P&L.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; narrower than total interest expense.
Accrued interest within current liabilities, not the P&L expense line.
Equity item; not interest expense.
Equity item; not interest expense.
Component of lease liability measurement, not the income statement interest expense line.

variables.notes: The main P&L 'Interest expense' line is selected as total interest cost; more specific or supplemental interest lines are excluded.

candidates.row_label: Share of results from associated company and gain on equity interest
candidates.why: Income statement item; not an equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the Company
candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to parent shareholders only; a valid equity measure but excludes NCI.
Represents total book equity including non-controlling interests; best match for overall book equity (BE).
Represents total assets/liabilities plus equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Using Total equity (including non-controlling interest) as the book equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Net income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Flow measure (earnings) for NCI, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Comprehensive income flow to NCI, not the stock of minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling Interest
candidates.why: Another comprehensive income attribution; not the balance item.
EPS-related attribution; not the balance sheet minority interest.
Represents the equity attributable to minority shareholders; appropriate for MIB.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interest; same concept and values.

variables.notes: Selecting the explicit 'Minority Interest' balance sheet line as MIB (minority equity).
